#!/usr/bin/bash 

echo "[+] Installing super-ls"
cp /usr/bin/ls $HOME/.local/bin/super-ls
echo -ne '#####                     (33%)\r'
sleep 1
echo -ne '#############             (66%)\r'
sleep 1
echo -ne '#######################   (100%)\r'
echo -ne '\n'
echo "[+] Installed super-ls :D"
